defects.note: Pre-existing backslashes are no longer doubled: input like '\\[red]x' becomes '\\\\[red]x' minus one level — the parser (_parse, below in this file) consumes the doubled backslash as an escaped literal and the bracket tag goes LIVE, so user-controlled text can inject markup (styles, [link=...]) through escape(). The trailing-lone-backslash guard is also gone, letting user text ending in a backslash swallow adjacent application markup.
